title: Basic JavaScript DOM Traversal
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript DOM Traversal. Focus on implementing parentNode vs parentElement correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript DOM Traversal
description: Create a function that uses parentNode vs parentElement and childNodes vs children together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript DOM Traversal Project
description: Build a small application that applies parentNode vs parentElement, childNodes vs children, firstChild vs firstElementChild in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript DOM Traversal
description: The following code has bugs related to parentNode vs parentElement. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript DOM Traversal
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with parentNode vs parentElement and childNodes vs children.
